title: gogo charts manifest
description: An index of an as-built diagram set: implement (②) emits one into charts/ so review (③) and test (④) can reason about the diagrams, and report (⑤) emits one as report/manifest.json indexing the as-built report bundle (which /gogo:done archives to the changelog). Only diagrams that carry signal are listed (per the diagram-subject rules in gogo-mermaid); a feature with nothing meaningful to draw has an empty diagrams array and a note.

slug.description: Feature slug these charts belong to (kebab-case, without the feature- prefix).

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the manifest was last written.

note.description: Optional explanation, e.g. why a kind was skipped or why diagrams is empty (pure-process change).

diagrams.description: The diagrams produced for this feature. Empty when the change carries no meaningful structure/behaviour to draw.

members.description: Additive, changelog-entry only: the member feature slugs a /gogo:done entry ships — one slug for a single entry, several for a merged release. Lets gogo-status classify a merged entry's members as shipped even though the entry folder is named after the release, not each slug. Absent on a plain report/implement charts manifest.

kind.description: Diagram kind, per gogo-mermaid conventions. flow=control/data flow; sequence=runtime call sequence; class=structure/types; activity=action/lifecycle/state machine; use-case=user-facing capability (an actor<->use-case graph, rendered as a flowchart since mermaid has no native use-case type).

file.description: Repo-relative path to the .mmd source (under the feature's charts/ folder, or report/ for the as-built report bundle).

title.description: Short human title for the diagram (what it shows about the product).
